description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows with black frames that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house includes a spacious balcony with outdoor seating, a garage door, and a small landscaped area with a tree and stone path. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a small garden area visible. The house's layout suggests open-plan living spaces and multiple rooms on both floors. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, a balcony, and a garage, featuring minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing two large windows, a plain white wall, and a small green area with a tree.
description_view_1: Front view with a balcony, large glass windows, a garage door, main entry, and landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a small garden area at the back corner.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, a few small windows, and a visible garden patch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, adjacent garage, small porch area, and minimal landscaping
